text:
New on Disney+ | July 2026
Here’s a sneak peek at what’s coming to Disney+ and Hulu on Disney+ for bundle subscribers in July 2026:


July 1 – X-Men ‘97 (Season 2 | Premiere)
July 2 – Ready or Not 2: Here I Come 
July 3 – The Simpsons: Simpsley (Disney+ Exclusive Episode)
July 5 – Hammerhead Sharks Up Close with Bertie Gregory (Season Premiere | All Episodes)
July 5, 12, 19, 26  – Women’s Sports Sundays 
July 10 – Project Runway (Season 22 | Premiere) 
July 10 – Celebrity Family Feud (Season Premiere)
July 10 – Press Your Luck (Season Premiere)
July 14 – Dancing with the Stars: The Next Pro (Season Premiere)
July 17 – Descendants: Wicked Wonderland 
July 20 – King of the Hill (Season 15 | Premiere)
July 23 – Pompeii Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston (Season Premiere | All Episodes)
July 24, 25 – WNBA All-Star
July 26 – NFL FLAG Championships
July 27 – Furious (Season Premiere)
July 29 – The Devil Wears Prada 2
July 29 – The Proud Family: Louder and Prouder (Season 4 | Premiere) 
July 30 – August 2 – Lollapalooza 
July 31 – Mickey Mouse Clubhouse+ Mickey’s Country Farm Special
